name: fi-cmms-monorepo
description: Fractal-Informed Computerized Maintenance Management System (Native Microservices)

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "UI,GW,AS,WO,IV,AI" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:assets" "npm run dev:workorders" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
